summary: Planned Phase 9 (Tier-2 Skills & Remaining Connectors) — 6 tasks: ConfluenceConnector, CIConnector, graph exports, 5 Tier-2 skill SKILL.md updates, verification.

concerns: Connectors use httpClient DI for testability — same pattern as JiraConnector/SlackConnector
ConfluenceConnector uses Confluence REST API v2 (cloud) — may differ from on-prem
CIConnector targets GitHub Actions API — other CI systems would need separate connectors
decisions: ConfluenceConnector creates document nodes, links to code via linkToCode keyword matching
CIConnector creates build + test_result nodes, links via SHA and file path matching
Both connectors follow established pattern: httpClient DI, graceful API key error, IngestResult return
Tier-2 skill updates are documentation-only — add graph notes to context gathering sections
